v0.10.0.description:
## Installation

1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your
   Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory.
2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game.
3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or
   open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address
   bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar
   **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or
   Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use
   `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar).
4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched
   RomFS — see the
   [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md)
   for the click-by-click guide.

See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md)
for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).


## What's Changed
* fix(client): bound death-reload Lua stall so checks/warp don't freeze for ~1 min by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/89
* fix(client): block /warp in boss arenas + fix push-handler delivery deadlock by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/90
* fix: Main Power Bomb grants ammo capacity, not just the unlock flag by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/91
* test(gui): fix stale ReconnectPopup assertion in gui smoke test by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/92
* Drain item backlogs fast with burst-mode popup/reschedule overrides by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/71
* fix(client): block /warp in Navigation (Adam) rooms and Save Stations by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/93
* fix(world): stop over-classifying Missile Tank copies as advancement by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/94
* feat(options): customizable Missile/PB tank ammo + Flash Shift/Speed Booster upgrade amounts by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/95
* Expose Randovania-style progressive items (Suit, Spin, Charge, Beam, Missile, Bomb) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/96


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.9.2...v0.10.0
v0.10.0.title: v0.10.0

3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or
   open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address
   bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar
   **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or
   Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use
   `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar).
4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched
   RomFS — see the
   [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md)
   for the click-by-click guide.

See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md)
for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).


## What's Changed
* Catch unrecognized-romfs patch failures and surface patcher status by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/130
* Runtime bridge IP + prebuilt sysmodule: /setup needs no toolchain by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/132
* build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/131


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.14.2...v0.15.0

v0.18.2.description:
## What's Changed
* docs(transport-rando): confirm Itorash capsule exclusion is correct (post-RB escape crash) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/138
* feat(world): add Universal Tracker support by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/139
* Bound the Cataris thermal-toggle gap, per-station /warp, and Nav Station AP hints by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/140
* Un-hide Suitless trick + guard full accessibility for all-tricks-disabled seeds by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/141
* ci(release): fix devkitPro pacman 403 (Cloudflare WAF) in sysmodule build by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/142


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.17.1...v0.18.2

v0.19.0.description:
## What's Changed
* ci(release): disable tag-push auto-publish (devkitPro WAF blocks hosted runners) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/143
* feat(warp): add nav + map stations as /warp targets by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/144
* feat(warp): persist visited stations in AP DataStorage (survive client restart) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/145
* fix(transport): shuffle no longer silently falls back to vanilla at low trick levels by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/146
* feat(ut): human-readable /explain + /get_logical_path for Universal Tracker by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/147


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.18.1...v0.19.0
v0.19.0.title: v0.19.0

v0.20.1.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(logic): sever false-positive one-way rotatable "flipper" turn edges by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/148
* feat(warp): block /warp in Ghavoran flipper-trap rooms, direct to checkpoint reload by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/149
* Drop unreachable-by-config locations instead of failing full-accessibility gen by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/150
* chore(release): sync apworld manifest version to the tag + automate it by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/151
* fix(patcher): don't invoke the frozen Archipelago launcher as the patcher Python by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/152


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.19.0...v0.20.1

v0.6.2.description:
## Installation

1. Download `dread.apworld` (below) and drop it into your
   Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory.
2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game.
3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or
   open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address
   bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar
   **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or
   Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use
   `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar).
4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched
   RomFS — see the
   [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md)
   for the click-by-click guide.

See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md)
for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).


## What's Changed
* Bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/53
* Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/52
* Bump actions/setup-python from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/51
* Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/50
* Revert to dial-out networking (/dread_connect on 6969) + harden reconnect by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/56

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/53

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2
v0.6.2.title: v0.6.2

   Archipelago install's `custom_worlds/` directory.
2. Generate a multiworld using `Metroid Dread` as the game.
3. Launch the **Dread Client** from Archipelago's Launcher (or
   open a `.dreadap` file). The window includes an AP server address
   bar, a **"Dread"** tab (live status + log), and a top-bar
   **Switch-status pill** for pointing the client at your Switch or
   Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use
   `/dread_connect <ip>` in the command bar).
4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched
   RomFS — see the
   [first-time setup walkthrough](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/docs/first-time-setup.md)
   for the click-by-click guide.

See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md)
for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).


## What's Changed
* fix: quote shell paths to handle spaces in Windows username by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/72
* Fix cross-slot pickups granting +2 missiles in Dread by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/73
* Add missing Super Missile item + harden item extraction by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/74
* Skip auto-patch gracefully when SD card is not mounted on reconnect by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/75
* Rename locations to vanilla_item-based human-readable names by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/76


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.7.8...v0.8.0

   Ryujinx. Click the pill → edit the IP → **Reconnect** (or use

4. Run `/setup` in the client to build and deploy the patched
   RomFS — see the

See [README.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/blob/main/README.md)
for prerequisites (Switch hardware, Atmosphere CFW, Dread 2.1.0 RomFS, etc.).


## What's Changed
* Patch map-screen icons to match AP-shuffled remote/local items by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/77
* fix: relocate devkitPro build tree off paths with spaces by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/78
* Fix Cold damage logic: only Gravity Suit negates cold, not Varia by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/81
* Add /warp softlock-recovery command by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/80
* Add DeathLink support to the Dread AP client by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/79
* Remove logic-level softlock prevention (recovery via /warp) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/82
* Fix SD/Atmosphere deploy nesting the seed under DreadRandovania by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/84
* test: add Super Missile to late-game loadout fixtures by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/85


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0
